headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Revvity, Raises Price Target to $125
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Vijay Kumar   maintains Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $110 to $125.
